# Capsorix

> A premium digital product studio that builds elite iOS apps, Android apps, and web platforms — full-cycle, from idea to launch.

Capsorix is a senior-led software studio specializing in high-end mobile and web product development. We partner with startups, enterprises, and individuals to design, engineer, and ship considered digital products that feel expensive and perform flawlessly.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, process, industries served, case studies, and contact.
- [iOS Development](/ios): Native iOS apps with Swift and SwiftUI — App Store launch included.
- [Android Development](/android): Kotlin and Jetpack Compose apps with clean architecture and Material 3 design.
- [Web Platforms](/web): Production-grade websites, dashboards, and web applications engineered for speed and conversion.

## Services

- iOS App Development: Native Swift/SwiftUI apps engineered to Apple's standards.
- Android App Development: Kotlin + Jetpack Compose with clean architecture.
- Web Platform Engineering: Fast, conversion-focused websites, dashboards, and SaaS platforms.
- UI/UX Design: Interface design and product consulting.
- Full-Cycle Product Development: From concept and prototyping to launch and iteration.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Structured URLs for search engines.
- [Robots](/robots.txt): Crawler directives.
